steps.title: Find the core subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is MindMaze's technology, which is singular. The phrase alongside other such neuromodulation technologies adds related information but does not make the subject plural.

steps.title: Use a complete singular predicate
steps.content: Choice A is only a participle and leaves the clause incomplete. Choice C and Choice D use plural auxiliaries that disagree with the singular subject. The sentence needs the singular finite verb phrase is paving. The answer is B.
